closed_commits.message: fix: clean up HQ progression guidance
fix: correct Tyrant and steel guidance

verification: text scan for old Tyrant-as-Steel-source claims
result: The HQ / Tyrant / Steel consistency hardening block is complete. Tyrant is no longer described as a confirmed Steel source, and Steel guidance now routes through confirmed or safer steel planning sources.
residual_risks: Live rewards can change by server stage or future update.
Third-party pages still conflict with the owner in-game check.
Exact Steel income values from bounties, nodes, shops, Furylord, and launch events need ongoing validation.
recommended_next_step: Return to LLM worker infrastructure with proposal-first, owner-approval, deterministic-check guardrails.
